upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The proposal strictly widens the parent eta=0 independent-cumulant contact class to eta-bounded off-diagonal leakage and includes the mandatory eta=0 parent reduction.

repo_prior_art.cite: parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1: inclusion and equality boundary under eta=0 independent cumulant matching

published_prior_art.cite: PlagborgMollerWolf2021: LP/VAR impulse responses agree under common identifying restrictions
LanneLiuLuoto2026 identifies dependent non-Gaussian shocks under absent co-moments but does not give an LP/sign critical leakage support frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1 left eta-leakage and reflected O(2) boundary cases unresolved

published_prior_art.cite: Guay2021 gives higher-moment rank conditions; AriasRubioRamirezWaggoner2018 gives sign/zero algorithms; neither gives the leakage-radius formula

strengthening_paths.suggestion: State the regular-frontier condition as an explicit Jacobian or transversality rank condition in the residual program, so Stage 0 has a concrete non-tautological target.
Add a short corollary translating eta_w^*(P) into a testable null for HoeschLeeMesters2024-style weak-identification robust inference.
For the two-shock formula, spell out the rotation and reflection component parameterizations separately to make the closed-form residual auditable.

recommended_next_step: Proceed to Stage 0 with Conjecture 1 as the flagship kernel and Conjecture 2 as the computable witness.
